name: <ModelName>_setScalarParameter
title: <ModelName>_setScalarParameter
description: 5: Wrong index: No parameter exists with the given index.
tables: Deprecated Function The parameterization functions are deprecated. It is much easier to use the generated System variables directly. Example: @myModel::Subsystem::Frequency = 1.0;Instead ofmyModel_setParamter(index, 1.0); Some parameters might not be configurable during measurement. This depends on the implementation of a Simulink block. If the <ModelName>_set functions are used in the preStart section of a CAPL program, all parameters will be configurable and will use the new values during measurement. Parameterization requires the C-API for data exchange which is available since MATLAB R14. <ModelName> = placeholder for Simulink model
Sets a scalar model parameter to the given value.

index Model parameter. You can find the index of the model parameter in the file <ModelName>_M.csv which is located in the destination directory of the code generation, i.e the target directory of the model DLL.
value The new value of the parameter.
5: Wrong index: No parameter exists with the given index.
